'''Niclara Varnillian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] who joined the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. She was part of the operations crew that tested the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] on the planet Alderaan. The destruction of her homeworld did not affect her in the least. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she was transferred to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Pulsar (Star Destroyer)|''Pulsar'']] to serve as chief gunnery officer under Commander [[Dor Reder]].

While on leave on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], Varnillian identified a pair of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives, but she botched the [[Skirmish on Ord Mantell (3 ABY)|mission]] to capture them, resulting in several Imperial soldier fatalities. She was demoted, but remained aboard the ''Pulsar'' until the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

After the ''Pulsar'' surrendered, Varnillian and a group of Imperial troops were able to steal a rebel transport and escape. She was last known to have led a group of Imperial vessels in attacks on New Republic installations throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
